name: demolisher-rework
title: Demolisher Rework
author: Ervins
description: Overhauls demolisher repopulation on Vulcanus. Worm deaths trigger a three-phase cycle: a cooling grace period, a contested state with a yellow hazard-stripe minimap overlay, then migration where a neighbouring demolisher clones itself and walks to reclaim the territory. Players can intercept and kill the migrant to prevent recapture. Build-trigger enrage included. All timings, HP multipliers, and territory radius are fully configurable in Mod Settings.
